---
name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature request"
about: Suggest a plugin, protocol, port, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
  Acid Zero is an AUTHORIZED / educational / defensive tool (see ETHICS.md).
  Requests whose only purpose is unauthorized attack, mass-targeting, or evading
  detection will be declined. Every offensive capability must pair with its own
  detection / defense.
-->

### What do you want, and why
The problem this solves or the capability you'd add.

### Proposed approach
How you imagine it working (UI plugin / native plugin / co-processor firmware /
docs, etc.).

### Detection & defense pairing
<!-- REQUIRED for any offensive capability: how does one detect and defend
     against the technique? This layer is what keeps Acid Zero educational. -->

### Scope check
- [ ] This stays within **authorized / own-lab / educational** use (ETHICS.md)
- [ ] It does **not** remove or weaken the consent gate or Learn layer
- [ ] It is **not** a destructive / DoS payload

### Alternatives / references
Anything you looked at, similar projects, datasheets, links.
